column1:
We were expecting Dave to call, but he hasn't.

Dave should_____________________ .

They said they were going to deliver the computer at lunchtime, but they didn't. 

They should______________________ .

column2: have delivered the computer at lunchtime

column1:
I was expecting the film to come out at the cinema last week. 

The film ought________________________ .

column2: to have come out at the cinema last week

column1:
The shop wasn't supposed to close so early. 

The shop shouldn't______________________ .

Was the programme supposed to start at eight o'clock? 

Should________________________ .

column2: the programme have started at eight o'clock
